evals.prompt: How do I find email addresses for a company using OpenWeb Ninja?
evals.expected_output: Guidance on using Website Contacts Scraper and/or Email Search APIs to find email addresses

assertions.name: mentions_scraper_or_email_search
assertions.description: Mentions Website Contacts Scraper or Email Search API

assertions.name: mentions_domain_query_input
assertions.description: Explains domain or query parameter input

assertions.name: mentions_free_tier
assertions.description: Mentions pricing with free tier available

evals.prompt: How do I build a local business prospect list from Google Maps using OpenWeb Ninja?
evals.expected_output: Guidance on using the Local Business Data API for prospecting from Google Maps

assertions.name: mentions_business_fields
assertions.description: Explains 40+ business fields including phone, email, or ratings

evals.prompt: How do I use the OpenWeb Ninja Web Search API to research competitors?
evals.expected_output: Guidance on using the Real-Time Web Search API for competitor research

assertions.name: mentions_serp_results
assertions.description: Explains SERP results including organic, knowledge graph, or AI overviews

assertions.name: mentions_results_volume_or_localization
assertions.description: Mentions up to 500 results per query or localization support
